calendar.matters:
To Set Aside Defaul And Default Judgment; P/A; Declarations
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Yvonne Mere, Esq., supervising attorney and Dave Crow, Esq., NAPIL Equal Justice Fellow, VOLUNTEER LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM, 415-575-3130 appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Ralph Gage. Brian Rosales, KIMBALL, TIREY & St. JOHN, 800-525-1690, appeared on behalf plaintiff and opposing party Apartment investment and Management Company.

Plaintiff orally withdrew opposition to the motion. Defendant Ralph Gage's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment GRANTED. Order signed in open court. (JJM/KH) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
